questions.question: In the number $456$, what is the value of the digit $5$?
The average temperature in a region is $24.67$ degrees. What is this number rounded to the nearest tenth?
Write the number $945$ in expanded form.
A weather station recorded $117.3$ mm of rainfall. What is the value of the digit $1$ in this number?
The ecosystem of a forest is balanced when the temperature is between $18$ and $22$ degrees. What is the range of possible temperatures in this ecosystem?
A scientist measured the temperature of a lake to be $15.23$ degrees. What is this number in standard form?
The water level in a reservoir rose by $23.45$ meters. What is the value of the digit $4$ in this number?
A city's average annual rainfall is $876.25$ mm. What is this number rounded to the nearest hundred?
A glacier is melting at a rate of $0.05$ meters per day. If it melts for $25$ days, what is the total distance it will have melted? Write your answer in expanded form.

The temperature in a region is expected to drop by $12.8$ degrees over the next $5$ days. If the current temperature is $25.2$ degrees, what will the temperature be in $5$ days? Write your answer in standard form.

teacher_rules: Make sure students show their work for the free-response questions.
Encourage students to use a calculator to check their answers.
Remind students to label their answers with the correct units.
